title: Fang Prime

description.canonical: A set of ceremonial daggers from the Orokin era, the Fang Prime's blades resonate violently as they strike. This allows them to pierce hardened materials like armor with ease.
description.display: （英文：FANG PRIME）一组来自奥罗金时代的仪式匕首，狼牙 Prime 的攻击使刀片猛烈共振，这使得它们能够轻易刺穿坚硬材质如护甲。

summary: （英文：FANG PRIME）一组来自奥罗金时代的仪式匕首，狼牙 Prime 的攻击使刀片猛烈共振，这使得它们能够轻易刺穿坚硬材质如护甲。
